shared_context.latest_general_news_title: Dow Jones And U.S. Index Outlook: Some CPI Morning Bullishness
shared_context.latest_general_news_content: Stock benchmarks are attempting a fresh rebound, powered by the soft CPI print. Markets were on quite a rout but are now pushing to recover.
